meta.title: Alicyclobacillus acidiphilus sp. nov., a novel thermo-acidophilic, {omega}-alicyclic fatty acid-containing bacterium isolated from acidic beverages
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The correct NRIC accession number of the type strain of Alicyclobacillus acidiphilus is NRIC 0496, not NRIC 6496 as listed in the paper (Sanae Okada, Curator, NRIC, personal communication).
